description: Deminji 1.5 Mini (Free) - Our fastest model for general use cases. (Free)
Deminji 1.5 Gecko (Free) - Performance and speed for efficiency. (Free)
Deminji 1.5 Nitro - The most powerful model for complex computations.
Deminji SQL Coder - Our first code assistant, able to generate any SQL query in seconds!
Deminji Coder - Our second generalized code assistant, able to generate any code in seconds!
GPT 4 - OpenAI GPT 4 Model
GPT 4o - OpenAI 4o Model
Search GPT- An OpenAI GPT-4-Turbo based Model ( Internet Access & 'Chat Memory' Disabled )
Chat GPT - OpenAI CHATGPT Model
Claude 3 Opus - Our most intelligent model, offering best-in-market performance on highly complex tasks.
Claude 3 Sonnet - Strikes the ideal balance between intelligence and speed, particularly for enterprise workloads.
Claude 3 Haiku - Our fastest, most compact model for near-instant responsiveness.
ChatGPT 4o Latest - The latest version of ChatGPT with improved features.
GPT 4o Mini (2024-07-18) - A lightweight version optimized for speed.
GPT 4o Mini - A compact version designed for everyday use.
GPT 3.5 Turbo (0125) - A fast and efficient version of GPT-3.5.
Flux Realism - Artistic style focusing on realistic representation. Suitable for generating realistic images.
Flux Anime - Anime-inspired artistic style. Ideal for generating anime-style images.
Flux - General Flux style. Can be used for diverse image generation.
Flux 3D - Three-dimensional artistic representation. Great for generating 3D images.
Flux Disney - Disney-inspired artistic style. Perfect for creating whimsical Disney-style images.
Flux Pixel - Pixel art style. Excellent for generating pixelated images.
Flux 4O - A specific Flux style. Useful for generating images with a unique 4O flair.
Any Dark - A dark-themed style. Ideal for generating dark-themed imagery.
GPT 3.5 Turbo (1106) - A refined model for improved performance.
GPT 4o - An advanced version of the 4o model.
Gemini 1.5 Flash - A quick-response model for fast tasks.
Gemini 1.5 Pro - A powerful model designed for professional use.
